title: Electrical Safety Awareness & Risk Management (2 Days)
subtitle: A 2-day HRD Corp-claimable safety programme for strengthening awareness and practice in electrical safety awareness & risk management.
whyThisMatters: Electrical Safety Awareness & Risk Management (2 Days helps workplace teams recognize hazards, apply controls, and make electrical safety awareness & risk management part of everyday operations. Participants explore ELECTRICAL SAFETY AWARENESS AND RISK MANAGEMENT IN WORKPLACE (2 Days), Module 1: Introduction to Electrical Safety, and Module 7: Workplace Management so safety expectations become easier to understand, discuss, and act on.
builtFor: Employees in operational, site-based, or technical roles
Supervisors responsible for daily safety practices
Teams that need stronger safety awareness and prevention habits
walkAwayWith: Recognize relevant workplace hazards and risk factors earlier.
Apply safer work practices and basic control measures.
Understand individual responsibility in safety, health, or environmental performance.
Support better reporting, prevention, and follow-through at work.

modules.title: ELECTRICAL SAFETY AWARENESS AND RISK MANAGEMENT IN WORKPLACE (2 Days)

methodologyCaption: The workshop uses workplace examples, discussion, and practical hazard-recognition activities to make safe behavior concrete.
sourceDoc: course/documents-markdown/Elec. Safety Awareness & Risk Management (2 Days.md
